name: empty-query
description: An empty DiscoveryQuery (no predicates) is a universal wildcard and must return all instances in the repository.

name: type-name-decision
description: typeName='decision' must return exactly the 5 decision records and nothing else.

name: type-name-metric
description: typeName='metric' must return exactly the 2 metric records.

name: type-name-event
description: typeName='event' must return exactly the 1 event record.

name: type-namespace-fixture
description: typeNamespace='com.srs.discovery.fixture' must return exactly the 8 package-typed records; Notes and TypedRecords are excluded.

name: container-decisions-and-planning
description: containerId filter for 'Decisions and Planning' must return exactly its 7 member instances.

name: container-metrics-and-events
description: containerId filter for 'Metrics and Events' must return exactly its 4 member instances.

name: tag-single-infrastructure
description: tag=['infrastructure'] (AND-conjunction over one tag) must return exactly the 2 records carrying the 'infrastructure' tag.

name: tag-conjunction-infrastructure-cloud
description: tag=['infrastructure','cloud'] (AND-conjunction) must return only the single record carrying both tags.

name: tag-single-launch
description: tag=['launch'] must return exactly the 1 record tagged 'launch'.

name: lifecycle-state-active
description: lifecycleState='active' (requires ext:lifecycle) must return exactly the 1 record in the active state.

name: lifecycle-state-superseded
description: lifecycleState='superseded' must return exactly the 1 superseded record.

name: lifecycle-state-draft
description: lifecycleState='draft' must return exactly the 1 draft record.

name: tier-note
description: tier=0 must return exactly the 2 Note instances (Tier 0).

name: tier-typed-record
description: tier=1 must return exactly the 2 TypedRecord instances (Tier 1).

name: tier-record
description: tier=2 must return exactly the 8 Record instances (Tier 2).

name: combined-type-and-tag
description: Conjunction of typeName='decision' and tag=['infrastructure'] must return only the 2 infrastructure decisions; the AND across predicates is enforced.

name: combined-container-and-lifecycle
description: Conjunction of containerId='Decisions and Planning' and lifecycleState='active' must return only the 1 active decision in that container.

name: content-match-postgresql
description: contentMatch='postgresql' (case-insensitive substring) must include the record whose title and body text contain 'PostgreSQL'. This is a recall-floor scenario: the implementation may return additional results.

name: content-match-api
description: contentMatch='api' must include records matching via title text ('API error rate') and via tag value ('api' on the GraphQL decision). Recall-floor guarantee.

name: content-match-architecture
description: contentMatch='architecture' must include records matching via title ('Architecture principles', 'Adopt microservices architecture') and body text ('component-based architecture'). Recall-floor guarantee.

name: content-match-infrastructure
description: contentMatch='infrastructure' must include records matching via tag values (tag 'infrastructure' on two decisions). Demonstrates that tag segments participate in text projection. Recall-floor guarantee.
